name: Fruit Chili Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Mixed pickling spices (tied in a bag)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and chop the vegetables and fruit.
2. Add sugar, salt, vinegar, and spices to the chopped vegetables and fruit.
3. Simmer slowly uncovered until thick, about two hours.
4. Discard the spices.
5. Pour into sterilized jars and seal.
